steps.title: Compare cost reductions
steps.content: The text says digital technologies lowered book-production costs, but the largest decreases were in manufacturing and distribution, which happen after writing, editing, and design.

steps.title: Draw the cost inference
steps.content: A discusses writing long books, B discusses customers, and C discusses publishers' title variety; none follows from the cost comparison. If later stages had the biggest reductions, earlier stages were less affected. The answer is D.
